Two open items on the insurance voice agent are still flagging. First, add the live transfer ask into Maya's prompt so she offers to bridge to a licensed advisor when intent score crosses threshold. ### 7. BUILD OUTBOUND RETRY + NURTURE / RESCHEDULE N8N WORKFLOWS
Two linked workflows and a real SLA differentiator. Outbound retry: failed calls from the 75% initial connect rate loop back through N8N into the same Retell agent with exponential backoff. Nurture / reschedule: when a prospect says "call me at X time," write a timestamped row to Supabase and trigger a delayed re-call via N8N wait node. Ship both today as one N8N project since they share the retry trigger plumbing. Still on the plate from Monday.

### 8. PHONE NUMBER FORMATTING CODE NODE ON OUTBOUND FORM (16+ DAYS)
Trivial hygiene fix that keeps leaking. Drop a Code node into the outbound form workflow that normalizes dashed, undashed, and +country-code phone inputs into E.164 before the Retell call fires. 15 minutes. No blocker, no dependency. Ship it while waiting on item 5 resolution.

Commitment is now 17 days stale. ### 10. WEBSITE FIXES ON orayalabs.ai (BUTTONS + PRICING CLARITY)
